question: How many likes does Kyle have?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM likes JOIN highschooler ON likes.liked_id = highschooler.id WHERE highschooler.name = 'Kyle';
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM likes JOIN highschooler ON likes.liked_id = highschooler.id WHERE highschooler.name = 'Kyle';
